basic_details.job_title: TMC HBCH Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital Varanasi (TMC HBCH)
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital Varanasi (TMC HBCH) has released the official Clinical Research Coordinator Notification 2026 at tmc.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with B.Sc./ B.Pharm./ M.Sc./ M.Pharm./ BAMS/ BDS/ BHMS/ BUMS, a PG Diploma in Clinical Research, and one year of clinical research experience can attend the walk-in interview on 29 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc/ B.Pharm/ Msc/ M.pharm/ BAMS/ BDS/ BHMS/ BUMS, PG Diploma in Clinical research
qualification.details: BSc/ B.Pharm/ Msc/ M.pharm/ BAMS/ BDS/ BHMS/ BUMS with PG Diploma in Clinical research mandatory and One year of experience in clinical Research mandatory.

rows.tata_memorial_centre_homi_bhabha_cancer_: BSc/ B.Pharm/ Msc/ M.pharm/ BAMS/ BDS/ BHMS/ BUMS, PG Diploma in Clinical research

content_sections.heading: TMC HBCH Clinical Research Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC HBCH Clinical Research Coordinator Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: BSc/ B.Pharm/ Msc/ M.pharm/ BAMS/ BDS/ BHMS/ BUMS with PG Diploma in Clinical research mandatory and One year of experience in clinical Research mandatory.

content_sections.heading: TMC HBCH Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC HBCH Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the TMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital Varanasi Recruitment 2026 is Clinical Research Coordinator.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Research Coordinator post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 29,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a BSc/B.Pharm/Msc/M.pharm/BAMS/BDS/BHMS/BUMS degree along with a PG Diploma in Clinical Research and one year of experience in clinical research.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an MCQ Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the interview venue for the walk-in?
faq.answer: The interview venue is Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, 221005.
